'''Ne'Chak''' was a green [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Gender/Legends|male]], who worked as a security specialist and [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]].

==Biography==
[[File:Rodian_henchman.jpg|thumb|left|150px|One of the Rodian security guards working under Ne'Chak.]]

Ne'Chak was hired by the entertainment complex [[Bantha Traxx]] on [[Lianna/Legends|Lianna]] to train a group of [[Jawa/Legends|Jawas]] as security agents. Although reluctant and with reservations as to their ability, Ne'Chak agreed to train them as return favor to [[Yin Vocta]]. Much to Ne'Chak's surprise, the Jawas proved remarkably capable as he taught them hand-to-hand combat and weapons training.<ref name="Wretched Hives of Scum & Villainy">''[[Wretched Hives of Scum & Villainy]]''</ref>

Following this, Ne'Chak was hired by the [[Sludir]] [[Omze'kehr Kahr]] as the captain of his security forces. Stationed about the converted [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] known as ''[[Omze's Incredible Traveling Starport/Legends|Omze's Incredible Traveling Starport]]'', Ne'Chak commanded a team of Rodian mercenaries in peace keeping duties.
